description: As the occupational health physician, document the death of Bonifacio Caput in GNU Health for OSHA and clinical records. He died today from lethal hydrogen sulfide (H2S) exposure (850 ppm) in a confined space following unsuccessful resuscitation. Mark the patient as deceased with today's date and record the cause of death using the appropriate ICD-10 code for toxic effects of hydrogen sulfide. Create active disease records for the toxic exposure and the contributing terminal acute respiratory failure, and complete a final clinical evaluation documenting the terminal event. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
